narrative:
Washington Township has 3,304 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
